Ceterach officinarum is a type of fern, also known as the wood fern, a plant with fronds that resemble a wood or a tree. The health benefits of Ceterach officinarum include its ability to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation.
